senses.def_en: to dispute or argue about, esp. in a formal manner
senses.example: The two candidates for mayor will debate environmental issues. // We debated for several hours before taking a vote.
senses.example_zh: 两位市长候选人将针对环境问题进行辩论。我们辩论了好几个小时才投票。

senses.def_en: a situation in which two or more people disagree, often angrily
senses.example: Please write down the terms of the contract to avoid any arguments between the two parties.
senses.example_zh: 请记下合约的条款，以免双方日后发生争论。

senses.def_en: a fact or statement put forth as proof or evidence
senses.example: state one's argument
senses.example_zh: 提出论点

senses.example: We must settle this by argument, not by fighting.
senses.example_zh: 我们应当通过说理来解决这个问题，而不是通过打架。

derivatives: argumentative a. 好争辩的;议论文的

entries.mnemonic: re(again)+mark(做标记)+able→一再做标记→值得注意的

senses.def_en: worthy of notice, esp. for being unusual or extraordinary
senses.example: Qian Zhongshu had a remarkable memory; he only needed to read something once before learning it by heart.
senses.example_zh: 钱锺书有非凡的记忆力，他能过目不忘。

senses.def_en: a customer or sb. who receives services
senses.example: He has been a client of our bank for many years.
senses.example_zh: 他多年来一直是我们银行的客户。

entries.mnemonic: ten(十)+ant(蚂蚁)→十只蚂蚁成了"房客"

senses.example: Tenants of apartments often try to find partners to share it to pay less rent.
senses.example_zh: 公寓套房的租户常常试图找到合住者以少付些房租。

derivatives: tenancy n. 租赁期限;租用

senses.def_en: one who owns a business; an owner
senses.example: He is now sole proprietor of the business.
senses.example_zh: 他现在一个人拥有这家公司。

senses.example: Put the scraps of paper in the wastebasket.
senses.example_zh: 将碎纸片放到废纸篓里。

senses.example: He sold his car for its scrap value.
senses.example_zh: 他把自己的小汽车当作废铁卖掉了。

senses.example: He gave scraps of food to the dog.
senses.example_zh: 剩余的食物他拿去喂狗了。

senses.example: We had to scrap our plans.
senses.example_zh: 我们不得不放弃我们的计划。

entries.mnemonic: scrap(碎屑)+e→碎屑是被刮下来的→刮

senses.example: Please scrape the dish clean. // She scraped the mud off her shoes.
senses.example_zh: 请把盘子擦干净。她刮去鞋上的泥。

senses.example: One can only hear the scrape of their pens on paper.
senses.example_zh: 只听见他们的笔尖在纸上所发出的沙沙声。

derivatives: 【短语】scrape together/up 费力地获得 // scrape by/through 勉强通过：Danni just scraped through her exams. 丹妮勉强通过了考试。

senses.example: a slice of bread
senses.example_zh: 一片面包

senses.example: Every company wants to gain a bigger slice of the pie.
senses.example_zh: 每个公司都想占据更大的市场份额。

senses.example: Slice the cucumbers and add them to the meat.
senses.example_zh: 把黄瓜切片，然后加进肉里。

senses.def_en: the rearing and training received during childhood
senses.example: He owed his success to the good upbringing he had.
senses.example_zh: 他的成功归功于他受到的良好教养。

senses.example: Only one third of the land can be cultivated.
senses.example_zh: 只有三分之一的土地可以耕种。

senses.def_en: to acquire or develop sth. such as a skill by education
senses.example: They often take their child to concerts to cultivate a love of music in him.
senses.example_zh: 他们经常带孩子去听音乐会以培养他对音乐的热爱。
